name: Salon & Spa
description: Hair salons, beauty parlours, spas and wellness studios

subcategories.name: Hair & Beauty Salon
sceneEnvironments: Modern salon interior with stylist chairs and large mirrors, warm lighting, clean professional setting
Close-up of a fresh hairstyle or makeup look, soft flattering light, polished finish
Styling station with professional tools neatly arranged, bright airy salon background
greetingExamples: Look your festive best with us
Wishing you a season of glow and confidence
offerExamples: Haircut + Spa combo at a special price

subcategories.name: Spa & Wellness
subcategories.description: Day spa, massage and wellness studio
sceneEnvironments: Serene spa room with candles, rolled towels and orchids, soft diffused warm light, calming tones
Close-up of massage stones, essential oils and flowers on a wooden tray, tranquil mood
Relaxing spa setting with a softly lit treatment bed, gentle steam, peaceful atmosphere
greetingExamples: Unwind and glow this festive season
Wishing you peace, calm and self-care

subcategories.name: Nail & Skin Studio
subcategories.description: Nail art studio or skincare clinic
sceneEnvironments: Close-up of elegant manicured nails with soft glossy finish, clean bright styling
Skincare flat-lay with serums and tools on a clean pastel surface, fresh airy light
Modern studio detail with polish bottles or skincare products neatly arranged
greetingExamples: Glow from within this festive season
